## [vercel@56.5.0](https://github.com/vercel/vercel/releases/tag/vercel%4056.5.0)
*GitHub Releases · Vercel CLI* | 22/07/2026 | Score: 0.70
Tags: cli_tool, tool_update

> <h3>Minor Changes</h3> <ul> <li><a class="commit-link" data-hovercard-type="commit" data-hovercard-url="https://github.com/vercel/vercel/commit/ab9c7751e76203bf0941fbf66ceea8077411099b/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vercel/vercel/commit/ab9c7751e76203bf0941fbf66ceea8077411099b"><tt>ab9c775</tt></a>: Add <code>vercel ai-gateway budgets</code> set/list/remove commands</li> </ul> <h3>Patch Changes</h3> <ul> <li><a class="commit-link" data-hovercard-type="commit" data-hovercard-url="https://github.com/vercel/vercel/commit/83c72a4ef75409e7212a3d706c12ee54cf29aee4/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vercel/vercel/commit/83c72a4ef75409e7212a3d706c12ee54cf29aee4"><tt>83c72a4</tt></a>: Recover from sensitive Environment Variable step-up challenges in every command that fetches Environment Variables (<code>vercel dev</code>, <code>vercel pull</code>, <code>vercel env run</code>, <code>vercel build</code>, <code>vercel link</code>, OIDC token refresh), not just <code>vercel env pull</code>. The device-code re-authentication flow now lives at the shared env-records layer, so any <code>challenge_required</code> response triggers it when running interactively.</li> <li><a class="commit-link" data-hovercard-type="commit" data-hovercard-url="https://github.com/vercel/vercel/commit/4e9df75c1dad04a2ab1648acd0f9471550a5f34f/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vercel/vercel/commit/4e9df75c1dad04a2ab1648acd0f9471550a5f34f"><tt>4e9df75</tt></a>: Add <code>vercel comments</code> — a project-aware inbox for Vercel Toolbar comments. List unresolved comments for the linked project (focused on the current Git branch), inspect full threads, reply, resolve/reopen (optionally with a closing reply via <code>-m</code>), and edit/delete messages. Supports <code>--format json</code> with a stable envelope for scripting and agents.</li> <li><a class="commit-link" data-hovercard-type="commit" data-hovercard-url="https://github.com/vercel/vercel/commit/b789421290de86ba5ae046e6748295dd516e9b04/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vercel/vercel/commit/b789421290de86ba5ae046e6748295dd516e9b04"><tt>b789421</tt></a>: Precompile <code>vercel.json</code> validation to improve CLI startup performance.</li> <li>Updated dependencies [<a class="commit-link" data-hovercard-type="commit" data-hovercard-url="https://github.com/vercel/vercel/commit/393645b729842f39dcaed0a561b462d256237b90/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vercel/vercel/commit/393645b729842f39dcaed0a561b462d256237b90"><tt>393645b</tt></a>]</li> <li>Updated dependencies [<a class="commit-link" data-hovercard-type="commit" data-hovercard-url="https://github.com/vercel/vercel/commit/41a3f2fea58a187b50213fefc4ea93f5e86d4426/hovercard" href="https://github.com/vercel/vercel/commit/41a3f2fea58a187b50213fefc4ea93f5e86d4426"><tt>41a3f2f</tt></a>] <ul> <li>@vercel/python@6.51.1</li> </ul> </li> </ul>
